conditionDescriptions: Severe chronic kidney disease with eGFR < 15 ml/min per 1.73 m²
contraindications.clinicalRationale: Clinical trial eligibility criteria excluded patients with severe CKD (eGFR < 15 ml/min per 1.73 m²), indicating limited safety data in this population. The SAVOR-TIMI 53 trial required eGFR ≥ 15 ml/min per 1.73 m² for inclusion.
contraindications.riskDescription: Limited safety data in severe CKD population; increased risk of heart failure was observed in clinical trials
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Consider other antidiabetic agents with established safety profiles in severe CKD
contraindications.sourceSnippet: Saxagliptin (SAVOR-TIMI 53): kidney eligibility eGFR ≥15 ml/min per 1.73 m2; primary outcome MACE; key adverse events: HF; any hypoglycemic event (minor and major) also more common

warnings.warningText: Increased risk of heart failure and hypoglycemic events observed in clinical trials for patients with diabetes and chronic kidney disease
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with chronic kidney disease and diabetes mellitus
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor for signs and symptoms of heart failure; monitor blood glucose levels closely; assess risk-benefit ratio
